arts.ttl: Arsenal vs Fulham – Match preview and team news
arts.sum: Arsenal are back in competitive action this evening as they host London rivals Fulham in the Premier League. The Gunners approach the final portion of the campaign residing in second place in the table. Mikel Arteta has received a huge boost personnel-wise, with Bukayo Saka recovering from a significant hamstring injury. arts.ttl: Will Bukayo Saka be Available vs. Fulham?
arts.sum: Bukayo Saka is pushing to make his return to the Arsenal lineup on Tuesday, Apr. 1 against Fulham in the Premier League.

arts.ttl: Arsenal, Chelsea 'willing to submit' offers up to €40m for Barcelona midfielder this summer
arts.sum: Arsenal and Chelsea are reportedly preparing bids up to £33.4m for Barcelona and Spain youngster Marc Casado, who has fallen down the pecking order in Catalonia.

arts.ttl: Bayern set timeframe for decision on Sané's future amid Arsenal links
arts.sum: Bayern Munich have reportedly set a deadline for a decision on Leroy Sane's future, with Arsenal thought to be ready to capitalize if the winger's contract isn't renewed.

arts.ttl: Player told he could be playing for Arsenal if he started exploiting his talent more
arts.sum: Rapid Wien striker Dion Beljo could be playing for Arsenal, if he started exploiting his talent and showing love for the game. That’s according to Sky analyst Alfred Tatar, who has hit out at the player and the Rapid Wien squad in comments today. arts.ttl: Will Bukayo Saka play for Arsenal vs Fulham? Injury news latest amid FPL worry
arts.sum: Arsenal will be hoping to welcome Bukayo Saka back into their starting XI for the first time in four months when they host Fulham in Tuesday night Premier League action. Fantasy Premier League (FPL) has passed Saka 100 percent fit for Fulham's visit to the Emirates Stadium on Tuesday night.

arts.ttl: Gyokeres? Zubimendi? What Arsenal's big summer under Berta could look like
arts.sum: Sky Sports' Sam Blitz analyses what Arsenal's new sporting director Andrea Berta's priorities will be and who the club could sign in the summer transfer window.
